name: Map Room Founded
description: Create the repo shell, charter, guardrails, and first redacted census import.
unlock_condition: Initial scaffold committed and seed data validated.

name: First Roster Rendered
description: Display the imported specialists, constructs, routes, and stations in the Specialist Roster.
unlock_condition: GET /agents returns seed data and the web app renders it.

name: First Field Report
description: Store and display a manually created field report from the event ledger.
unlock_condition: POST /events persists to SQLite and Field Reports shows the entry.

name: First Little Guys
description: Render at least three visual states: awake, dormant, and blocked/review-needed.
unlock_condition: Bureau HQ shows animated/stateful specialist cards from real event state.

name: Map Room Online
description: Run the local read-only API and dashboard together so Expedition HQ can answer what the little AI guys are doing.
unlock_condition: Dashboard loads from the local API and shows the Map Room Online field report.
